'''Balderik Rajana''' was the commander of the secret [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic outpost|outpost]] on [[Carosi XII]]. At the time he took command of the newly-built base, he was young and idealistic, having fought the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] for most of his life.

{{Char-stub}}
